title: Modern Typing, Generics, and API Evolution · Behavior Case: Oop Generic Classes
summary: Type-check interchangeable repositories, policies, events, and domain collections in Python 3.14. objectives: Define generic classes and functions whose type parameters express a real input-output relationship.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
